creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

there hasn't been any activity with your problem report for lang/perl5.16
(see [1]) for quite a while. What is the state of things here? Does the
problem still exist, or should this PR be closed?

Best regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/173920
